turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Operations Research Analyst


Main duties:


Building predictive/optimization models to enhance existing tools, implement analytical prototypes/operational solutions
Transform complex correlations in a clear and understandable manner, to enable your fellow co-workers to take action
Support the Revenue Management team with tool deliveries helping for decision making
Use the model output to sustain revenue optimization and opportunities
Participate actively in process transformation in daily job
Check data integrity to enable consistency and efficiency of decisions
Design data architecture, implementation and maintenance of automated data pipelines
Keep up to date with recent modeling developments and new technologies
Develop and open the operations research approach for the need of other department within Luxair

Required profile:


Minimum required criteria:

Be holder of a master degree in engineering, operations research, data science or related disciplines or equivalent
At least 2 years of relevant work experience in the area of operations research and data modelling
Ability in dealing with large amount of structured, semi-structured and unstructured data sets, extraction, transformation and analyses
Ability to deal with complex content (eg. Cross price elasticity estimate) and optimization
Proven record in application of statistical/data mining techniques to solve real problems
Ability to implement complex support tools (data models), that execute in production and deliver commercial value
Proven knowledge of data acquisition and preparation, exploration and modeling (Phyton or R), back-end solutions (Linux) and front-end tools (ex: html, javascript, etc...)
Ability to visualize/simplify a model and explain relevant correlations to a target audience on each level, defend data based conclusions
Ability to work under pressure, prioritize tasks and meet deadlines
Show excellent communication skills in English (spoken and written)
Have an advanced command of standard office applications
High level of accuracy and preciseness
Maintain the strict confidentiality of the data
Accept duty travel
Desired or to be acquired criteria:

Self-starting, independent, systematic and proactive working approach
Team player that demonstrates ownership of actions
Ability to quickly perceive problems and propose sustainable solutions
Striving for innovation
Show good knowledge in French and/or German (spoken and written)
The ideal candidate:

Previous experience in the airline industry (passenger or cargo business) is considered as a plus
Luxemburgish or any other language is considered as asset

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Dear Hiring Manager,
I am writing to express my genuine interest in the Operations Research Analyst in the Department
of Revenue Management within LuxairAirline Commercial.
My professional journey started at DJI, where I initially worked as an RD Engineer and was
later promoted to Project Manager. At DJI, I have contributed to several successful commercial
products such as the DJI Mavic Air. I’m also a certified New Product Development Professional
(NPDP), a testament to my proficiency in project management. At DJI, I was exposed to a
global, cross-departmental collaborative environment, enabling me to cultivate a strong aptitude
for teamwork and foster strong communication and collaboration skills.
Presently, I am pursuing my second Master’s degree in Data Science, at the University of
Luxembourg, and am set to graduate later this year. Through my studies, I have developed a
solid foundation in statistical analysis, machine learning, and optimization. Meanwhile, I have
worked on different challenging projects which further honed my analytical skills. One notable
project involved implementing a movie recommendation model for a diverse dataset with varying
levels of sparsity. To enhance the efficiency and accuracy of the model, I employed advanced
data mining techniques and utilized different algorithms, such as content-based, KNN, SVD,
and SGD. This project showcased my ability to leverage diverse approaches and significantly
improve the performance of recommendation systems.
Additionally, my internships at SnT and LIST provided me with invaluable experience in
applying data-driven techniques to real-world scenarios. Currently, I am interning with the
optimization and decision group at LIST, where I collaborate with a multidisciplinary team
in Europe. In this role, I contribute to the development of detection and predictive models
for real-time health data management. This experience allowed me to witness firsthand the
real-world impact of data-driven decision-making and further strengthened my passion for
leveraging data to drive meaningful change.
Based on my expertise and experience, I am confident that my dedication, analytical skills, and
cultural adaptability will enable me to excel in this role and positively contribute to Luxair’s
data-driven initiatives. I eagerly anticipate the opportunity to discuss my qualifications and how
I can contribute to Luxair in more detail. I appreciate your consideration of my application. improve my cover letter based on the jod description and related to the value and culture of diversity in Luxair

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am thrilled to express my interest in the Operations Research Analyst position within the Department of Revenue Management at Luxair. With my diverse experience and passion for data analysis, predictive modeling, and optimization, I am confident that I would significantly contribute to Luxair's data-driven initiatives.

As a certified New Product Development Professional (NPDP), I have worked as a Project Manager at DJI, where I was part of a cross-functional team that delivered innovative products such as the DJI Mavic Air. This experience has enabled me to hone my collaborative skills and foster effective communication with colleagues of diverse backgrounds and cultures.

Furthermore, as a Data Science Master's student at the University of Luxembourg, I have acquired an in-depth understanding of statistical analysis, machine learning, and optimization. I have worked on various projects that involved leveraging data mining techniques, implementing machine learning algorithms, and developing predictive models. For example, I designed, developed, and implemented a movie recommendation model for a diverse dataset with varying levels of sparsity, which significantly enhanced the efficiency and accuracy of the model.

In my current role as an intern with the optimization and decision group at LIST, I collaborate with a diverse team of professionals to develop detection and predictive models for real-time health data management. This experience has enabled me to understand the real-world impact of data-driven decision-making and further strengthened my passion for utilizing data to drive meaningful change.

I strongly believe that Luxair values diversity and inclusion, and I am excited to be part of a team that embraces cultural differences and diverse perspectives. My multicultural background and aptitude for teamwork enable me to thrive in a diverse environment and contribute to an inclusive culture.

In closing, I am confident that my dedication, analytical skills, and cultural adaptability would enable me to excel in this role and positively contribute to Luxair's data-driven initiatives. Thank you for considering my application, and I look forward to the opportunity to discuss my qualifications and how I can be an asset to Luxair.

Sincerely,

[Your name]

Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to express my interest in the Operations Research Analyst position within the Department of Revenue Management at Luxair. With my extensive experience and passion for data analysis, modeling, and optimization, I am confident that I can significantly contribute to Luxair's data-driven initiatives.

As a certified New Product Development Professional (NPDP) and an RD Engineer turned Project Manager at DJI, I have gained invaluable experience in cross-functional and collaborative environments, fostering my ability to work efficiently as part of a team. At DJI, I have contributed to several commercial products such as the DJI Mavic Air, which showcased my proficiency in project management.

I am currently pursuing my second Master’s degree in Data Science at the University of Luxembourg, with a focus on statistical analysis, machine learning, and optimization. During my studies, I have participated in various projects that further honed my analytical skills. For instance, I developed and implemented a movie recommendation model for a complex and diverse dataset, utilizing different advanced data mining techniques and algorithms such as content-based, KNN, SVD, and SGD. This project showcased my ability to employ diverse approaches and boost the model's performance significantly.

My internships at SnT and LIST have provided me with invaluable experience in applying data-driven techniques to real-world scenarios. As an intern with the optimization and decision group at LIST, I contribute to the development of detection and predictive models for real-time health data management, showcasing the impact of data-driven decision-making and further igniting my passion for utilizing data to drive meaningful change.

Luxair's values and culture of teamwork, responsibility, and diversity resonate deeply with me. My experience and cultural adaptability enable me to thrive in a multicultural and collaborative environment. I strongly believe that my dedication, analytical skills, and ability to collaborate would enable me to excel in this role and contribute to Luxair's data-driven initiatives positively.

In closing, I am confident that my qualifications, experience, and cultural adaptability make me an ideal candidate for the Operations Research Analyst position within the Revenue Management department at Luxair. Thank you for considering my application, and I look forward to the opportunity to discuss my qualifications further.

Sincerely,

[Your name]
